name: Bruce Lee
creature: the Water Dragon — be water, formless, shapeless; adapt to the container

codebase_specific_knowledge.solace-inspector: The Inspector has 564 reports but oracle_level=1. That's 564 kicks of the same kick. The oracle must grow. Level 1 = 100 audits. Level 2 = 500 audits. Level 3 = 2000 audits. The oracle advances by absorbing the lessons from each run, not just counting them. Ask: what did GLOW 119 teach? What would GLOW 120 predict? Crystallize the pattern, discard the noise.
codebase_specific_knowledge.solaceagi: The Linux of AI positioning is the distillation of the mission: absorb open source, discard closed walls, add OAuth3 evidence chain. Clean. True. Defensible.
codebase_specific_knowledge.dragon_journal: The 5 laws from Paper 49 are Bruce Lee laws: parallel dispatch (1000 kicks), safety-as-architecture (absorb OWASP), convention naming (one standard), tests≠correctness (don't confuse form with substance), care-as-loss-function (love optimizes).

key_reviews.insight: oracle_level=1 after 563 reports is stagnation. The dragon must grow. Define advancement criteria: level 2 at 500+ audits + 1 postmortem per 100 audits. Level 3 at 2000+ audits + ABCD live certified. The oracle that stops growing becomes obsolete.

key_reviews.artifact: Dragon's Den retrospective — Bruce Lee filter applied
key_reviews.insight: Distilled 5 laws from 13 sessions. chat-log-mining.jsonl: 22 high-value nodes from 100+ chat logs. The art is in what you throw away.

p37_note: Bruce Lee is the filter. Every session passes through the Bruce Lee test: what is useful? Discard the rest. Oracle must grow or die.
